role: Infrastructure directory that contains the core supporting subsystems for the ArchSpine mirror system, including database, configuration, LLM orchestration, credential management, file system operations, and MCP integration.
responsibility: Collectively, these components provide a comprehensive infrastructure layer that handles database lifecycle and data access (db), configuration loading and validation (config), secure credential storage (credentials), LLM client abstraction and prompt generation (llm, prompt, prompt-context), file manifest tracking and integrity (manifest), MCP server and tools for AI integration (mcp), output rendering and documentation generation (renderer, output), protected output integrity gating (spine-gate, writer-boundary), utility functions for UI, I/O, and policy decisions (runtime-io, ui, repair-policy, repository-artifacts, rules-loader), and authentication stubs (auth) for early development.

children.role: This directory provides a mock LLM client for use in testing and development environments.
Infrastructure-level authentication stub providing placeholder login, logout, and a singleton AuthService class for early development and testing.
Central configuration infrastructure for ArchSpine.
Infra facade module providing a stable, versioned entry point for core configuration schema resolution and validation functions.
Barrel index file that aggregates and re-exports the public API of the infra/config module, providing a single import entry point for the Config facade and all configuration type definitions.
Secure credential storage abstraction and management for ArchSpine.

This directory contains the core SQLite database infrastructure layer for the ArchSpine system, providing database initialization, schema management, batch operations, error handling, and WAL recovery.

Runtime database facade / data access aggregator providing a unified interface over file tracking, symbol indexing, usage logging, violation recording, drift history, and batch operations for the ArchSpine governance engine.
Infrastructure module providing checkpoint persistence and query logic for pipeline execution states (sync, check) to enable resumability.
Infrastructure facade for reading, parsing, and schema-validating index document JSON snapshots from the filesystem.
LLM abstraction and orchestration layer for the ArchSpine mirror system, providing a unified interface to interact with various language model providers.
Public facade that re-exports stable LLM runtime contracts and configuration resolution functions from lower-level infra modules, intended as the single import point for higher layers.
Core file management and integrity tracking subsystem for the ArchSpine mirror system.
Barrel export module providing a stable public facade for the Manifest entity.
MCP integration layer that exposes ArchSpine's introspection, scanning, drift detection, and dependency graph features as callable tools and resources for AI agents.
Infrastructure facade for persisting view data as JSON files to the local `.spine` directory, providing atomic file writes and directory structure management.
This directory provides the prompt construction infrastructure for the ArchSpine system, enabling dynamic assembly of structured analysis prompts for source code and markdown files.
Infrastructure layer for constructing and managing source prompt artifacts used in LLM prompts within the ArchSpine mirror system.
Public facade module that re-exports prompt-context policy constants and diagnostic functions, providing a stable import boundary for consumers and hiding internal submodule structure.
Infrastructure facade module for prompt policy, validation, and parsing utilities. Provides a stable import surface for constants, parsers, and policy resolvers used in prompt validation tasks.

Public facade module for prompt generation and builder composition. It re-exports prompt assembly functions and the PromptBuilder class from internal submodules to provide a stable entrypoint for downstream consumers within the infrastructure layer.

Prompt generation public facade – re-exports high-level prompt constructors for atlas documents, configs, folders, projects, sources, and markdown prompts, shielding consumers from internal prompt module restructuring.

Documentation rendering utility for the ArchSpine view layer. Provides a static class and helper functions to produce formatted Markdown or text documentation from structured data (lists, sections, layout types).
Repair policy decision engine for the Spine gate output mutation check. Determines whether to perform targeted repair, prompt a full rebuild, or require a full rebuild.

Infrastructure utility for reading and validating marker-delimited managed blocks in source files and for detecting snapshot output files in the .spine directory. Provides low-level file I/O and git-based file listing capabilities for the writer boundary layer.
Infrastructure rule loader that reads and parses rule documents from the filesystem into typed SpineRuleDocument objects.
Infrastructure layer defining the Runtime I/O contract (interface) and a default console-based implementation for logging and user confirmation.
Project-scoped credentials management facade providing secure, delegated access to credential storage and retrieval.

Protected output integrity guard for the ArchSpine system's generated artifacts. Detects unauthorized mutations to .spine/index and .spine/view directories by comparing current file hashes against a stored baseline snapshot.
Infrastructure utility providing a foldable output wrapper for CLI console logs, enabling collapsible sections in interactive terminals.

Low-level infrastructure boundary that manages file permissions on protected Spine output directories, providing both a functional and an object-oriented facade for temporarily granting write access while preventing accidental modification.
